title: China-to-Gabon Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters in Gabon Projects
rows.target_requirement: No standalone Gabon public EMC regulation dedicated to PV inverters was identified in the sources reviewed. For grid-tied or financed PV projects, EMC acceptance is likely to be driven by AGANOR standards and conformity expectations, SEEG connection review, and donor, lender, or EPC specifications. The practical evidence set should include IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power conversion equipment EMC, relevant IEC 61000 immunity and emission reports, and harmonic-current evidence such as IEC 61000-3-2 where applicable to the inverter rating and configuration.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission and immunity standards
IEC 61000-3-2 — Harmonic current emission limits where applicable by current rating
AGANOR standards and conformity-assessment context for Gabon market documentation
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly based on GB/T 37408 and related domestic test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. Those reports may use IEC 61000-derived methods, but a China-only GB/T report is not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62920 report requested by a Gabon project owner, SEEG reviewer, lender, or EPC contractor.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: GB/T EMC evidence should be mapped clause-by-clause against IEC 62920 and the applicable IEC 61000 reports requested in the Gabon project specification. Exporters should prepare IEC EMC type-test reports for the supplied model, identify the tested firmware and hardware revision, confirm whether results remain valid at 220/380 V and the intended power rating, and provide installation guidance for cable routing, earthing, surge protection, and humid tropical environments.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by AGANOR conformity review, SEEG connection conditions, project-owner procurement, EPC specifications, donor rules, or lender technical due diligence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven in China depending on certification route; China-only GB/T EMC evidence is not a Gabon acceptance decision

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a GB/T 37408 EMC report will satisfy a Gabon project file. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 evidence for the exact inverter model, and confirm the required report list with AGANOR, SEEG, the EPC contractor, and any donor or lender before shipment.

rows.requirement: SEEG Grid-Connection Review — IEC 62116 Anti-Islanding, IEC 61727 Utility Interface, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
rows.target_requirement: Gabon does not publish a Qatar-style national public PV inverter connection specification in the sources reviewed. In practice, utility-interconnected PV projects should expect SEEG technical connection review and project-specific requirements, with IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence commonly requested by developers, lenders, and utility engineers. Gabon's low-voltage supply is commonly documented as 220/380 V at 50 Hz. Inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delays, voltage and frequency trip points, and reactive-power or power-factor behaviour should be validated for SEEG's local connection point rather than assumed from China factory defaults.
target_standards: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 60038 context — nominal low-voltage systems, with Gabon commonly listed at 220/380 V, 50 Hz
SEEG project-specific technical connection conditions for grid-tied systems
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test reports. These documents are based on China grid practices and do not by themselves establish SEEG acceptance, ARSEE authorisation, or compliance with project-lender IEC requirements in Gabon.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid documents should be treated as supporting background only. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 test evidence for the exact inverter model or family, a SEEG-specific settings file, documentation of voltage/frequency protection thresholds, reconnection timing, anti-islanding mode, and commissioning test procedures. Any firmware profile designed for China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz network should still be checked against the actual Gabon connection point, local voltage variation, and SEEG project conditions.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied PV projects because SEEG connection approval and project-specific commissioning conditions govern interconnection; exact evidence depends on project size, connection point, and contract
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's domestic grid review only and is not transferable to SEEG Gabon grid-connection acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat SEEG connection approval as a project gate, not a paperwork formality. Chinese GB/T or NB/T grid certificates should be supplemented with IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, SEEG-specific firmware settings, and commissioning records for the actual Gabon connection point. Confirm the current SEEG connection procedure and technical settings before shipment.

source.publisher: SEEG (Societe d'Energie et d'Eau du Gabon)

rows.requirement: ARSEE Electricity-Sector Authorisation and Project Approval — Grid-Tied Solar PV
rows.target_requirement: ARSEE is Gabon's regulator for the drinking-water and electric-energy sectors. Commercial, utility-scale, or third-party grid-tied PV projects should expect regulatory authorisation, concession, licence, tariff, or contract review outside the inverter type-test package. The inverter evidence package therefore must support the project developer's ARSEE and SEEG submissions: model identification, IEC safety and grid-interface reports, country settings, installation manual in French where required, and environmental suitability for Gabon's humid equatorial operating conditions.
target_standards: ARSEE electricity-sector regulatory authorisation, licence, concession, tariff, or contract review as applicable to the project
SEEG technical connection conditions for utility-interconnected PV systems
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence used as project technical support
rows.china_equivalent: China's project approvals and grid-connection processes are administered under Chinese energy policy and Chinese grid operator rules. An inverter already used in a Chinese distributed or utility-scale PV project may have domestic connection records, but those records do not replace Gabon regulatory authorisation, SEEG connection review, or project-owner technical acceptance.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: A Chinese domestic project approval history does not answer Gabon project-authorisation questions. Exporters should coordinate with the Gabon project developer to confirm whether the project needs ARSEE licensing or contract review, whether SEEG is the off-taker or distribution connection reviewer, and whether donor or lender specifications require IEC reports, French documentation, spare-parts commitments, remote monitoring, or local service arrangements.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Gabon electricity-sector law, ARSEE authorisation, SEEG connection, PPA, concession, procurement, donor, or lender documents apply to the project
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese project approvals and domestic grid records do not transfer to Gabon regulatory or utility approval

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] For Gabon, inverter compliance is only one part of a project approval chain. Confirm ARSEE authorisation, SEEG connection conditions, PPA or concession requirements, and lender technical specifications before relying on Chinese domestic project records. Package IEC reports, French-language documentation, country settings, and service commitments for the developer's submission file.

source.publisher: ARSEE (Autorite de Regulation du secteur de l'Eau potable et de l'Energie Electrique)

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — AGANOR, SEEG, and Lender Documentation
rows.target_requirement: For Gabon PV projects, the practical safety baseline for solar inverters should be IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence, even where the immediate gate is AGANOR conformity review, SEEG technical acceptance, EPC procurement, donor specifications, or lender due diligence rather than a single published inverter regulation. Because Gabon is equatorial and humid, safety documentation should also address enclosure ingress protection, condensation management, corrosion protection, creepage and clearance assumptions, temperature derating, ventilation, and installation instructions suitable for rainforest and coastal operating environments.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
AGANOR standards and conformity-assessment context for Gabon market documentation
SEEG project-specific equipment acceptance and commissioning conditions
rows.china_equivalent: China's common PV inverter safety evidence includes GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 reports or voluntary product certificates. These can document domestic performance and safety testing, but they are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates for Gabon projects. Chinese certificates may also omit humid tropical installation assumptions, French documentation, and project-specific SEEG or lender requirements.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: GB/T or NB/T safety reports should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates and reports for the exact model or certified family. Exporters should provide the constructional data package, bill-of-material critical components, firmware revision, nameplate, French or bilingual installation and safety manual where required, IP rating, corrosion and humidity assumptions, and derating curves for Gabon ambient conditions. For projects financed by development institutions, confirm whether ILAC-accredited laboratory reports or IEC CB Scheme certificates are required.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where required by AGANOR conformity assessment, SEEG equipment acceptance, EPC procurement, donor or lender technical specifications, insurance, or project-owner HSE rules
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-route dependent for domestic China; China-only safety evidence is not a Gabon IEC safety acceptance decision

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-only GB/T or NB/T inverter safety file should not be treated as sufficient for Gabon PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence, tropical-environment installation assumptions, French or bilingual safety documentation where required, and model-family traceability before AGANOR, SEEG, EPC, donor, or lender review.

source.publisher: ISO member directory / AGANOR standards-body context
